name: cambia-monorepo
description: Cambia — a DESIGN.md extension that makes a design system role-aware and (optionally) adaptive.

scripts.build: bun run --filter='@cambia/core' build && bun run --filter='@cambia/runtime' build && bun run --filter='@cambia/react' build && bun run --filter='cambia' build
scripts.test: bun run --filter='@cambia/core' test && bun run --filter='@cambia/runtime' test
